Claude for Small Business

Stop doing work
Claude can do for you.

Treetop implements Claude inside your small business — custom workflows, team training, real ROI. No prompt libraries. No fluff. Actual transformation.

Get Claude Working → See All Services
Sound familiar?

You know AI should help.
It just hasn't yet.

⏳
Hours lost to writing
Emails, proposals, SOPs, reports — your team is writing things Claude could draft in seconds.
🔍
Research that eats the day
Competitive research, market analysis, summarizing documents — hours that shouldn't be hours.
🤯
Overwhelmed by AI options
ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot — too many tools, no clear path to actually using any of them well.
📉
Slower growth than you planned
The work that drives growth keeps getting pushed by the work that just keeps coming.
What you get

Everything you need to run
Claude inside your business.

Six deliverables. One engagement. A team that actually uses AI.

01
Workflow Audit
We map your actual workflows and identify the highest-ROI places to plug Claude in — specific to your team, not a generic list.
02
Claude Projects Configuration
Your Claude account set up with Projects, knowledge bases, and system prompts built for your business context.
03
Workflow Build
We build the actual workflows — prompts, templates, and processes your team can execute without thinking about it.
04
Integration Planning
Where Claude should connect to your existing stack — and a clear plan for when and how to do it.
05
Team Training
Hands-on sessions until your team is confident. We don't stop at setup — we stay until adoption is real.
06
ROI Measurement
Before-and-after time tracking on your specific workflows. You'll know exactly what you're getting back.
Use Cases

What Claude handles for you.

Sales Outreach Proposals Customer Comms Research & Analysis Content Creation Ops & SOPs Hiring Docs Financial Summaries
